playbook.intent: Build a system that compounds: every closed engagement produces a testimonial + a referral + a public artefact, so by day 90 inbound covers >=50% of new pipeline and outbound effort drops.
playbook.scope: Build a system that compounds: every closed engagement produces a testimonial + a referral + a public artefact, so by day 90 inbound covers >=50% of new pipeline and outbound effort drops.

success-criteria.criterion: Define the loop stage complete: Loop diagram
Build harvest SOPs stage complete: 3 SOPs
Distribute proof stage complete: Case study live
Referral + partner stage complete: Referral program doc

stage.name: Define the loop
stage.intent: Map the loop: every closed engagement → testimonial + referral + artefact.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once loop is documented and at least one past engagement has been retrofitted.

stage.name: Build harvest SOPs
stage.intent: Turn the loop into repeatable SOPs.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once SOPs run end-to-end on one closed engagement.

stage.name: Distribute proof
stage.intent: Surface testimonials + case studies where buyers look.

tasks.task: Publish case study + LinkedIn version + newsletter version
Add testimonials to landing page above the fold

stage.decision-gate: Advance once distribution surface covers landing + LinkedIn + newsletter.

stage.name: Referral + partner

tasks.task: Design referral incentive (cash, hours, or trade)
Set up intake qualification for inbound

stage.decision-gate: Advance once inbound covers ≥50% of new pipeline over 30 days.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content reputation-referral-pipeline-ramp --format md, agent: faion get-content reputation-referral-pipeline-ramp --format context, json: faion get-content reputation-referral-pipeline-ramp --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, global angle'}]
